<!-- v0.0.0-template -->
<!--
Player-facing release highlights, injected into the GitHub release body as
"What's new for your server" by release.yml's Compose step.

How to use, per release branch:
1. Change the FIRST line's marker to exactly the tag being cut, e.g. <!-- v2.9.0 -->.
2. Replace the bullets below with 2-5 plain-language lines: what a server owner
   or player NOTICES, not what the code does. Name the module/preset to touch
   if there is one. No commit jargon — the raw changelog is appended anyway.
3. Commit it with the version bump.

If the marker does not match the tag being released, this file is skipped
entirely (stale highlights never ship). Example bullets:

- Sword blocking plays its hurt sound again while blocking.
- The damage indicator's critical flash now triggers on a share of max health,
  so it means the same thing for every player.
-->
